summary: beIN Sports 1 stream integration testing completed. Preview environment WORKS perfectly, Vercel deployment COMPLETELY BROKEN (404 NOT_FOUND).

critical_bugs.impact: Vercel serverless functions are NOT deployed. Backend API endpoints do not exist on Vercel.
critical_bugs.root_cause: Vercel deployment was never created or was deleted. The /vercel-deploy/api/ serverless functions are not deployed to Vercel.
critical_bugs.evidence: curl returns: 'The deployment could not be found on Vercel. DEPLOYMENT_NOT_FOUND'

working_endpoints.note: Preview environment backend works perfectly - returns valid M3U8 manifest with proxied segment URLs

critical_bugs.issue: Entire Vercel deployment is missing - 404 NOT_FOUND page shown
critical_bugs.impact: Frontend is not deployed to Vercel at all. Users see Vercel's 404 error page.
critical_bugs.root_cause: Frontend was never deployed to Vercel or deployment was deleted

tested_features: beIN SPORTS 1 button clickable and selectable
Video player loads and plays content
Pre-roll ad system works (Lords Mobile ad played)

passed_tests: Preview environment: beIN SPORTS 1 button found and clickable
Preview environment: Video player initialization successful
Preview environment: Pre-roll ad system working
Backend API /api/bein1/stream.m3u8 returns valid M3U8 on preview
Backend API /api/bein1/seg.ts proxies segments correctly on preview

items.details: The frontend is NOT deployed to Vercel. Deploy /frontend directory to Vercel project 'banban-rho'. Set build command: 'yarn build', output directory: 'build', root directory: 'frontend'.

The /vercel-deploy/api/ serverless functions are NOT deployed. Either: (1) Create separate Vercel project for /vercel-deploy with root directory set to 'vercel-deploy', OR (2) Move /vercel-deploy/api/ and /vercel-deploy/vercel.json to project root and redeploy.
After deployment, verify: (1) Frontend loads at banban-rho.vercel.app, (2) API endpoints /api/bein1/stream.m3u8 and /api/bein1/seg.ts return 200 OK, (3) CORS headers are present on API responses.

items.task: Update frontend BACKEND_URL logic if needed
items.details: If serverless functions are deployed to different domain, update app.js BACKEND_URL logic for Vercel environment (currently returns empty string '' for same-origin).

comparison.preview_working: Preview environment (friendly-leakey-8.preview.emergentagent.com) works 100% - backend API returns valid M3U8, frontend loads, beIN1 stream plays with ads
comparison.vercel_broken: Vercel deployment (banban-rho.vercel.app) is 100% broken - returns 404 NOT_FOUND for both frontend and backend API endpoints
